title: Daily Cost Tracking
description: See exactly how much you spend per day, week, or month with the new cost bar chart on the Usage page

title: Activity Heatmap
description: Your Usage page now shows a full year of activity as a GitHub-style contribution heatmap

description: Accurate wall-clock time tracking with concurrent session support, now integrated into the sidebar footer

description: Unified design tokens across the app, and a new chat bubble layout for browsing conversation history

title: AI Journal
description: Your daily work automatically summarized by project, with smart session summaries

title: Work Tracker
description: Track your daily coding sessions, build streaks, and visualize weekly trends right from the sidebar
